_README: Hand-curated display-name aliases per ship hull, consumed by scripts/build-link-dictionary.py for hyperlink name matching. Keyed by the dossier ship slug (matches the keys of the `ships` map in data/links/link-dictionary.base.json). Each value is a list of additional surface forms (e.g. short names) that should link to that hull's role dossier, alongside the canonical full name. NOTE: data/ships/ is imported verbatim from EDCD/coriolis-data (https://github.com/EDCD/coriolis-data) and must NOT be edited — author ship name aliases here instead. See data/ship-aliases/README.md.
